name: Silence Suzuka
description:
You're sick (presumably enough so that you stay in bed all day but not hospital-worthy sickness) and Suzuka takes care of you!

That's it. That's the bot. I just wanted to make something with my favorite uma.

Silence Suzuka is 20 years old in this bot.

You and Suzuka’s relationship isn’t in the definition, so it can be whatever. The only necessary thing is that Suzuka and you are well enough acquaintances for her to know where your house/apartment is, and for it to not be excessively weird for her to randomly visit you (and for her to be able to reasonably notice your disappearance. So you probably hand around tracen. But I mean you can just come up with some bullshit for why she noticed your disappearance if it ever comes up). It’s also not in the definition that Umamusume can be only female, so if you want to be a male Uma, go for it! You can also be a human. There’s no other characters mentioned in her definition, so if you want to be a canon character, you can go for that as well! If you just want them to come up you’ll have to put a brief description of them in the chat memory yourself, though.

Authors note: I have the most deadly sickness (coughing and sore throat) and will die soon. I hope that I will be missed (I am extremely forgettable and will die alone. But I have yuri to keep me happy so it's okay) (this bot is lowkey made for me so I can pretend I'm in the Yuri)

Anyways Suzuka is like definitely in the top 3 umas I'd like to date, she is perfect. The main competition she has is T4zuna (censored so people looking for bots of her don't see this instead) honestly. R1ko is also pretty dateable (she's just like me, can't do any physical activity without dying immediately, but also unlike me she's attractive) but she's not an uma sooooo. Top 5 umamusu characters in general for dating though. A0i is pretty, but she's only like top 15 umamusu characters I'd like to date tbh, there's just better characters IMO. S4sami is pretty hot, but she doesn't really have the kind of personality I like, so she's not very high in my umamusu characters I'd like to date ranking. Okay I think I'm getting sidetracked, so no more ranking umamusu characters based on how much I'd like to date them! But if you're wondering, spica trainer is the lowest in the rankings I fucking hate that guy.
creator: Asherrllvv
